name: ICD Coding — Community-Acquired Pneumonia
description: Level 1 — single obvious diagnosis, one ICD-10 code
prompt: Patient: Male, 58 years old. Admitted with 5-day history of productive cough with yellow sputum, dyspnea, and high fever (39.2°C). Physical exam: coarse crackles right lower lobe. Chest X-ray: infiltrate right lower lobe. No prior lung disease. Diagnosis: Community-acquired pneumonia. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).
